sections.heading: What is Linishing and Linishing Machine?
sections.text: Multiple metal surface finishing services are provided for CNC machining parts in Junying, here CNClathing.com will explain what is linishing with its applications and advantages. What is Linishing and Linishing Machine? Linishing is a metal finishing technique that doing grinding or belt sanding operation with a linisher or a linish grinder to flatten the surface of metal products. The method can be used to improve overall flatness to get a level and even surface, and polish an object while working with finer grades of grindstone or sanding belt. Linishing machines need to be equipped with special abrasive belts or paper, which are ideal for both large metal products and small metal CNC pa...
